clusters.justification: These terms exhibit robust co-activation within salience and cortico-limbic pathways, mapping onto the high-level functional axis of emotional reactivity, valence processing, and mood state regulation.

This cluster reflects shared recruitment of mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal reward circuitries, underpinning the macroscopic computation of subjective utility, goal-directed motivation, and economic choice.

These terms consistently co-activate across the default mode network, representing the broad internally-directed processing domain responsible for integrating self-referential thought, autobiographical memory, and the representation of others.
